stories.headline: Zelenskyy calls for face-to-face Ukraine war negotiations in letter to Putin

stories.headline: Zelensky proposes face-to-face talks in open letter to Putin
stories.summary: Ukraine's president tells the Russian leader that only "direct engagement" between the two countries could end the war, with the US focused on Iran.

stories.headline: Zelenskyy asks Putin for meeting: What’s he offering, could Russia accept?

stories.headline: IAEA brokers Ukraine ceasefire to allow nuclear plant repairs

stories.headline: Hamas says won’t surrender arms but only police will carry weapons in Gaza
stories.summary: Hamas official Husam Badran, in an exclusive interview, lays out what the group is ready to do ahead of Cairo talks.

stories.headline: US imposes new sanctions on Cuban president and Castro family members

stories.headline: Drone explosion in Romanian port spurs Ukraine war spillover fears
stories.summary: European Commission president warns that the maritime drone attack was a 'direct consequence' of the Russia-Ukraine war.

stories.headline: Nazi salutes, Sikhs abused: Tensions soar in UK after Henry Nowak’s murder
stories.summary: Although the killed teen's father has warned against exploiting his family's tragedy, far-right groups are rallying.

stories.headline: UN boosts Lebanon aid appeal as Israeli war drives humanitarian crisis
stories.summary: The UN says it needs nearly $640m to help Lebanon over the next six months.

stories.headline: US-Iran war pushing millions into food crisis, warns UN
stories.summary: WFP warns that the war is causing substantial increases in food prices in a number of countries.

stories.headline: US visa rejections, war on Iran keep fans away from World Cup
stories.summary: High visa application fees, equally high rejection rates, an unwelcoming America, and the war combine to deter fans.

stories.headline: US raises pressure on Cuba as it sanctions President Diaz-Canel
stories.summary: Measures come as Cuba continues to experience food shortages and blackouts.

stories.headline: Xi Jinping to meet Kim Jong Un in rare visit to North Korea
stories.summary: It is taking place weeks after Xi met the leaders of the US and Russia - two countries that loom large over North Korea's foreign policy.

stories.headline: Airbus Delays XLR Deliveries to IndiGo as War Hits Suppliers
stories.summary: Airbus SE is falling behind on deliveries of the A321XLR, a longer-range version of its most popular jet, with Indian customer IndiGo unlikely to receive the full batch of nine units this year, according to people familiar with the matter.

stories.headline: Fuel Shocks, Rising Prices Imperil India Consumption Growth
stories.summary: The global energy crisis is threatening to slow spending among India’s vast middle class, undermining a fragile recovery in consumption and adding to the woes of an economy already grappling with a markets and currency slump.

stories.headline: Typhoon Jangmi sweeps northwards leaving 23 injured in Japan
stories.summary: More than 1 million people advised to evacuate homes amid 80mph winds and heavy rainTyphoon Jangmi (also known as Typhoon No 6) moved northwards over the course of this week. From Okinawa to mainland Japan, prolonged and heavy rainfall led to landslide warnings and the flooding of rivers, with Japan issuing level 4 warnings for some rivers, signalling a risk of overflowing. This level is high enough for municipalities to issue evacuation orders.

stories.headline: EU summit with western Balkan leaders to reaffirm membership prospects

stories.summary: Fireball seen after explosion at Mexico gas facility

stories.summary: Micro dramas have surged in popularity, but drawn criticism for often sensationalist content.

stories.headline: Trump lawyers refuse to reveal financial information to BBC in $10bn lawsuit

stories.headline: China, HK Investors Banned From SpaceX IPO Over Security
stories.summary: Underwriters on SpaceX’s $75 billion initial public offering have been told not to accept orders from investors in Hong Kong and China, citing US restrictions around the export of critical technology, people with knowledge of the matter said.

stories.headline: Fed Is In No Hurry To Raise Rates, BlackRock's Rosenberg Says
stories.summary: Jeffrey Rosenberg, BlackRock portfolio manager of the Systematic Multi-Strategy Fund, says after the May payrolls report, they're on the precipice of pricing in a full rate hike for this year. But he says policymakers are in no hurry to raise rates. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Traders Fully Bet on Fed Rate Hike This Year After Jobs Data
stories.summary: Traders in the $31 trillion Treasuries market fully priced in a Federal Reserve interest-rate hike by the end of this year after US job growth topped all forecasts in May, spurring yields higher.

stories.headline: Dollar Gains After Hot Jobs Data as Traders Price In Rate Hikes
stories.summary: The dollar advanced after US jobs data came in stronger than anticipated, signaling further signs of labor market resiliency, and progress in US-Iran peace deal talks stalled.

stories.headline: S&P 500’s Record Win Streak in Danger as AI Selloff Continues
stories.summary: A record weekly run for US stocks was in danger before the bell on Friday, as a rotation out of artificial-intelligence stocks continued and traders parsed fresh payrolls data.

stories.headline: Hillhouse Nears Stake Purchase in Goldman-Backed LRQA
stories.summary: Hillhouse Investment is close to buying a significant minority stake in UK-based certifications and inspections business LRQA from Goldman Sachs Group Inc.’s asset management arm, according to people familiar with the matter.

stories.headline: TPG, Oaktree, Oak Hill Lead €1 Billion Debt for Evoke Buyout
stories.summary: Private lenders including TPG Credit, Oaktree Capital Management and Oak Hill Capital Partners are set to provide around €1 billion ($1.2 billion) of funding for the acquisition of gambling firm Evoke Plc by Bally’s Intralot.

stories.headline: Hidden AI India Winners Add $48 Billion on Data-Center Boom
stories.summary: The overarching narrative is that Indian equity markets missed out on the global artificial intelligence boom. But a look under the hood reveals a slew of smaller firms winning from trillions of dollars being spent on AI capacity.

stories.headline: India Growth Beats Estimates on Strong Domestic Demand
stories.summary: India’s economy grew faster than expected in the three months through March, on sustained private and government spending before higher energy costs began weighing on the outlook.

stories.headline: Bitcoin Treasuries Shed $62 Billion in Deepening Crypto Rout
stories.summary: Bitcoin’s slide this week is adding fresh pressure to one of the most ambitious financial experiments to emerge from the recent crypto boom: publicly traded companies created to accumulate digital assets on behalf of investors.

stories.headline: AI Trade Falters; Chinese Investors Banned from SpaceX IPO; Jobs Report | Bloomberg Brief 6/5/2026
stories.summary: US stocks head for its first weekly drop since March as the AI-fueled rally loses steam ahead of the May Jobs Report. Jensen Huang confirms that Nvidia has certified Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron to supply the most advanced high-bandwidth products for its AI accelerators. stories.headline: Trump Keeps Immunity from I.R.S. Audits, Even as $1.8 Billion Fund Falls Away
stories.summary: Even as they rebelled against a $1.8 billion fund for President Trump’s allies, Republicans looked the other way as his administration granted him potentially lucrative tax protections.

stories.headline: Deal to Renew FISA Surveillance Law Falters in the Senate Over Pulte
stories.summary: Democrats who had been expected to supply the votes necessary to advance it balked after President Trump named Bill Pulte to head the intelligence apparatus.

stories.headline: House Passes Ukraine Aid in Defiance of Republican Leaders

stories.headline: Japan sees shortage of plastic bags, trays and gloves, as Iran war-induced naphtha shortage worsens

stories.headline: Fifa bans all water bottles from World Cup games
stories.summary: Fifa has been warned it is putting fans' health at risk by introducing a bottle ban at this summer's World Cup.

stories.headline: Miracle on Everest: Guide believed dead spotted crawling down ice
stories.summary: Cleaners found Dawa Sherpa crawling towards Base Camp six days after he went missing at a higher altitude.

stories.headline: Postal Service Frees Up Enough Cash to Keep Operating for ‘Several Years’
stories.summary: The agency had warned it could run out of money within months, but its regulators said suspending payments to a retirement fund had given officials more time to find a permanent solution.

stories.headline: Diane Carlson Evans Dies at 79; Led Campaign for Vietnam Women’s Memorial
stories.summary: A former Army nurse who served in combat, she coordinated a 10-year effort to create a monument recognizing the contributions of the war’s thousands of nurses.

stories.headline: Jan. 6 Rioter Is Hired to Work in Sensitive Pentagon Office
stories.summary: It was not clear who hired Elias Irizarry, who pleaded guilty to various offenses at the Capitol and was later pardoned by President Trump.

stories.headline: Here's why counting votes in California is taking so long
stories.summary: It could take weeks - or even a month - before we know who won elections in California and Los Angeles.

stories.headline: Kushner-backed luxury resort plan sparks protests in Albania
stories.summary: Demonstrators say the project backed by Donald Trump's son-in-law would harm a protected environment.

stories.headline: Stocks and Bonds Fall as Jobs Fuel Fed-Hike Bets: Markets Wrap
stories.summary: Wall Street’s historic weekly run is poised to come to a halt, with stocks and bonds falling after a solid jobs report added to speculation the Federal Reserve’s next interest-rate move will be a hike.

stories.headline: Senators Cassidy and Booker Ask Judge to Maintain Block on $1.8 Billion Fund
stories.summary: Bill Cassidy, a Republican, and Cory Booker, a Democrat, maintained that the fund was “an immediate and dire threat to our constitutional order and the authority of Congress.”

stories.headline: Civilians flee as Somali troops and opposition-allied militias trade fire in Mogadishu

stories.headline: Canada endorses embattled marine park’s plan to relocate 30 beluga whales
stories.summary: Beluga whales, which Marineland threatened to euthanize in 2025, will be moved to sanctuaries in Spain or across USCanada and an embattled marine park have reached a tentative deal on the future of 30 beluga whales, ending a saga that has captivated the public and angered animal rights groups.The federal fisheries ministry announced this week that all of Marineland’s belugas would be shipped to either Spain or one of four locations in the US, end

stories.headline: Jamaican police officer charged with murder after woman shot during protest
stories.summary: Andrew Wilson appears in court over killing of Latoya Bulgin at protest over a police shooting days earlierAuthorities in Jamaica have taken the rare step of charging a police officer with murder after he was accused of shooting a 45-year-old woman in a case that prompted violent protests.According to the Independent Commission of Investigations (Indecom), Constable Andrew Wilson appeared in court on Wednesday and was denied bail. Another hearing

stories.headline: Grab what you can while you can: The new reality in the South China Sea
stories.summary: After years of watching China create land to back its expansive claims, others are doing the same.

stories.headline: Costly fuel pushes more Indians to buy electric cars but challenges remain
stories.summary: High fuel prices are strengthening the case for EV adoption in the world's third largest auto market.

stories.headline: Canada formally requests 16-year renewal of North American free trade pact
stories.summary: In a letter to his North American counterparts, US-Canada Trade Minister Dominic LeBlanc said the three countries should renew the USMCA trade deal.

stories.summary: Russia is intensifying attacks in Ukraine but more than four years of war are causing concern even among Putin loyalists.

stories.headline: Iran attacks damage 20 US military sites since start of war, satellite images show

stories.headline: Colombia presidential runoff pits leftist senator against pro-Trump rival

stories.headline: Israel seizes castle in Lebanon as it expands ground offensive
stories.summary: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu calls the capture of the strategic fortress a "decisive shift" in Israel's campaign against Hezbollah, as European governments criticise the escalation.

stories.headline: Netanyahu says he has directed IDF to increase control of Gaza to 70%
stories.summary: The expansion in control by Israel would contradict the terms of the ceasefire  Israel and Hamas agreed to in October 2025.

stories.headline: US and Iran 'very close' to deal but 'not there yet', Vance says
